questions.q: A student runs 800 meters in 3 minutes and 20 seconds. What is the speed of the student in meters per second?
questions.answer: The speed of the student is 26.67 m/s.

questions.q: A person performs 15 sit-ups in one minute. What is the percentage of the person's fitness level in sit-ups?
A group of students participated in a 4 km road race. The race finished in 25 minutes and 30 seconds. What is the average speed of the group in meters per minute?
questions.answer: The average speed of the group is 960 m/min.

questions.q: The height of a high jump board is _______________________ meters.
A person performs 3 sets of 10 push-ups in 3 minutes. What is the rate of push-ups in set per minute?
questions.answer: The rate of push-ups is 3.33 sets per minute.

questions.q: A student runs 400 meters in 1 minute and 20 seconds. What is the speed of the student in kilometers per hour?
questions.answer: The speed of the student is 23.33 km/h.

questions.q: Which of the following is the unit of distance?
A person performs 10 sets of 5 sit-ups in 10 minutes. What is the average rate of sit-ups in set per minute?
questions.answer: The average rate of sit-ups is 1 set per minute.

questions.q: The time taken by a person to complete 100 meters dash is 12 seconds. What is the speed of the person in meters per second?
questions.answer: The speed of the person is 8.33 m/s.

questions.q: A group of students participated in a 3 km road race. The race finished in 20 minutes. What is the average speed of the group in meters per second?
questions.answer: The average speed of the group is 240 m/s.
